title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at ICICI Direct - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, ICICI Direct in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICICI Direct:
ICICI Direct is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Direct!
